mapper.select: SELECT prgrm_id, sys_se_cd, prgrm_nm, prgrm_url, api_path_prefix, prgrm_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_prgrm WHERE prgrm_id = #{prgrmId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_prgrm (prgrm_id, sys_se_cd, prgrm_nm, prgrm_url, api_path_prefix, prgrm_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{prgrmId}, #{sysSeCd}, #{prgrmNm}, #{prgrmUrl}, #{apiPathPrefix}, #{prgrmDesc}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_prgrm SET sys_se_cd = #{sysSeCd}, prgrm_nm = #{prgrmNm}, prgrm_url = #{prgrmUrl}, api_path_prefix = #{apiPathPrefix}, prgrm_desc = #{prgrmDesc}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE prgrm_id = #{prgrmId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
